name: A11yWatch
description: A11yWatch — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: A11yWatch — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: A11yWatch: A11yWatch — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Automated WCAG scan across 500+ docs pages in CI
Pre-deploy accessibility regression check on staging
Scheduled weekly crawl for accessibility drift detection
API-driven a11y reports piped into GitHub PR checks
Bulk audit of redesigned design system components

pros: Self-hostable for privacy and CI pipelines
APIs and CLI support integration into dev workflows
cons: Less polished UI vs commercial a11y suites
Automated rules still miss 40-60% of a11y issues
Self-hosting means you own uptime and upgrades
review.verdict: Solid open-source pick for dev teams wiring a11y into CI, but automation alone won't pass a WCAG audit.
review.best_for: Engineering teams adding automated a11y checks to CI pipelines.
review.not_for: Legal or compliance teams needing certified WCAG audits.

transparency.reason: Freemium with public tiers and OSS code

developer_experience.reason: CLI, API, GitHub Action integration; docs moderate
